---
title: "Contact Us"
description: "Reach out for collaboration, media enquiries, or general information."
---

## Get in Touch

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

**🏛️ Address**  
DEN Economics Lab  
Faculty of Economics and Business  
Universitas Indonesia  
Depok, West Java 16424, Indonesia

**📧 General Enquiries**  
[den.econ@ui.ac.id](mailto:den.econ@ui.ac.id)

**🔬 Research Collaboration**  
[research@den-econ.github.io](mailto:research@den-econ.github.io)

**🎓 Graduate Admissions**  
[phd@den-econ.github.io](mailto:phd@den-econ.github.io)

**💻 GitHub**  
[github.com/den-econ](https://github.com/den-econ)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

To send us a message, please email us at
[den.econ@ui.ac.id](mailto:den.econ@ui.ac.id) with the subject line indicating
your enquiry (e.g., *Research Collaboration*, *Media Enquiry*, *PhD Application*,
*Data Request*).

We aim to respond within 3–5 working days.

:::

:::

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Can I join the lab as a PhD student?
Yes! We accept PhD students through the official Universitas Indonesia doctoral programme.
Contact us directly to discuss your research interests before applying.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Do you offer visiting researcher positions?
We welcome visiting researchers for periods of one to twelve months. Funding support
may be available depending on the project. Please reach out with your CV and proposal.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### How can I access your data?
Replication data for published papers is available on GitHub and data repositories.
For access to restricted administrative data, please contact us with details of your
research project.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Do you provide policy advice?
Lab members regularly engage with government agencies, international organisations,
and NGOs. For formal consultancy or policy work, please use the email contact above.
:::

:::
